title: EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES - 211info
text: ST LUKE'S CLINIC EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES EASTERN OREGON MEDICAL ASSOCIATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Clinic provides full spectrum medical care including physicals, women’s health, diabetes management, mental health services, obstetrics and family planning. Clinic also offers car seat inspections. Regular visits from the mobile mammography unit and specialists in cardiology, oncology, and genetic counseling for cancer. Van transportation is available to take cancer patients to and from their appointments. 3950 17th Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm, Saturday 8am-noon (urgent medical care only) (541) 523-1001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-1001 Alternate (111) 111-1111 211info Update Via Web [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and most private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm, Saturday 8am-noon Services: Cancer Clinics Child Passenger Safety Seat Inspections Contraception General Medical Care Genetic Counseling Obstetrics/Gynecology If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
